name: DIAMOND, COMMISSIONER OF PATENTS AND TRADEMARKS v. DIEHR et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in DIAMOND, COMMISSIONER OF PATENTS AND TRADEMARKS v. DIEHR et al. (450 U.S. 175, 1980 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
